class="PrimaryText-sc-982c2bc2-0 gRQaIJ">Fresh</span></h2><p class="FutureFreshBlock__Description-sc-51ceb890-4 edXdwz">At PetPlate, we’re forever learning and improving. That’s why we work with leading vet nutritionists to craft complete, balanced, and nutritionally-appropriate recipes for dogs everywhere.</p><img alt="bowl of FreshCooked food with product containers on the side" loading="lazy" width="1500" height="900" decoding="async" data-nimg="1" class="FutureFreshBlock__SImage-sc-51ceb890-5 fKlZQi" style="color:transparent" srcSet="/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Ffresh-cooked.3458b788.png&w=1920&q=75 1x, /_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Ffresh-cooked.3458b788.png&w=3840&q=75 2x" src="/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Ffresh-cooked.3458b788.png&w=3840&q=75"/></div><div class="FutureFreshBlock__RightBlock-sc-51ceb890-2 jvMWzR"><div class="FutureFreshBlock__InfoBlockWrapper-sc-51ceb890-7 NgiMp"><h4 class="FutureFreshBlock__InfoBlockTitle-sc-51ceb890-8 eUgtqJ">100% Human-grade</h4><span class="FutureFreshBlock__InfoBlockDescription-sc-51ceb890-9 fTcjNm">Our meals are made with human-grade meats and veggies to AAFCO standards and prepared in small batches according to USDA guidelines.</span></div><div class="FutureFreshBlock__InfoBlockWrapper-sc-51ceb890-7 NgiMp"><h4 class="FutureFreshBlock__InfoBlockTitle-sc-51ceb890-8 eUgtqJ">One-size does NOT fit all</h4><span class="FutureFreshBlock__InfoBlockDescription-sc-51ceb890-9 fTcjNm">We tailor your dog’s meal plan to their unique needs, traits, and preferences.</span></div><div class="FutureFreshBlock__InfoBlockWrapper-sc-51ceb890-7 NgiMp"><h4 class="FutureFreshBlock__InfoBlockTitle-sc-51ceb890-8 eUgtqJ">Unmatched Variety</h4><span class="FutureFreshBlock__InfoBlockDescription-sc-51ceb890-9 fTcjNm">We offer the widest variety of human-grade meals on the market. Pick your texture (wet, dry, or both!) and protein—we’ll take care of the rest.</span></div><a class="Button__StyledButton-sc-2a9baf4a-0 bkifdl FutureFreshBlock__BuildPlanButton-sc-51ceb890-6 cAGuom" class="Accordion__FlexWrapper-sc-77064ffe-1 habrfa"><div class="RichText__RichTextContainer-sc-9e038dfa-0 jqfZie Accordion__Title-sc-77064ffe-3 iviOXo"><h2><span>Time-saving </span><span style="color:#0055B8"><span>answers</span></span></h2></div><ul aria-roledescription="Accordion Control" class="Accordion__Ul-sc-79d9a0f4-0 jbGNuA Accordion__StyledAccordion-sc-77064ffe-4 fvSbBA"><li class="AccordionItem__ListItem-sc-494b3022-0 hFzaUm"><input type="checkbox" id="accordion-accordion-block-Why switch to PetPlate?" aria-expanded="true" class="AccordionItem__Checkbox-sc-494b3022-2 iTUcqV" name="Why switch to PetPlate?" checked=""/><label for="accordion-accordion-block-Why switch to PetPlate?" class="AccordionItem__Title-sc-494b3022-3 hntPhV">Why switch to PetPlate?<!-- --> <svg width="20" height="20" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 20 20" color="#0068E1"><path d="m4.75 7.25 5.25 5.5 5.25-5.5" stroke="#0068E1" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" vector-effect="non-scaling-stroke"></path></svg></label><div class="AccordionItem__Content-sc-494b3022-4 ivkvyJ"><div class="RichText__RichTextContainer-sc-9e038dfa-0 jqfZie"><p style="margin-top:0px;padding-top:0px"><span>At PetPlate, we don’t make dog food. We make food for dogs. Our meals are made with high-quality, human-grade, whole food ingredients, which are more bio-available than fillers and other low-quality ingredients. We prep and cook our meals in human-grade kitchens, the same way human food is made. Every meal is hot-filled to ensure safety and flash-frozen to lock in freshness.</span></p></div></div></li><li class="AccordionItem__ListItem-sc-494b3022-0 ftmqhr"><input type="checkbox" id="accordion-accordion-block-How does a subscription work?" aria-expanded="false" class="AccordionItem__Checkbox-sc-494b3022-2 iTUcqV" name="How does a subscription work?"/><label for="accordion-accordion-block-How does a subscription work?" class="AccordionItem__Title-sc-494b3022-3 hntPhV">How does a subscription work?<!-- --> <svg width="20" height="20" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 20 20" color="#0068E1"><path d="m4.75 7.25 5.25 5.5 5.25-5.5" stroke="#0068E1" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" vector-effect="non-scaling-stroke"></path></svg></label><div class="AccordionItem__Content-sc-494b3022-4 ivkvyJ"><div class="RichText__RichTextContainer-sc-9e038dfa-0 jqfZie"><p style="margin-top:0px;padding-top:0px"><span>You tell us about your dog and we'll create a meal plan that makes sense for both of you. We ship the right amount of food to your doorstep so you never have to worry about running out. Each meal is perfectly portioned so your pup always gets the right amount of nutrients.</span></p></div></div></li><li class="AccordionItem__ListItem-sc-494b3022-0 ftmqhr"><input type="checkbox" id="accordion-accordion-block-Can I order a sample to start?" aria-expanded="false" class="AccordionItem__Checkbox-sc-494b3022-2 iTUcqV" name="Can I order a sample to start?"/><label for="accordion-accordion-block-Can I order a sample to start?" class="AccordionItem__Title-sc-494b3022-3 hntPhV">Can I order a sample to start?<!-- --> <svg width="20" height="20" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 20 20" color="#0068E1"><path d="m4.75 7.25 5.25 5.5 5.25-5.5" stroke="#0068E1" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" vector-effect="non-scaling-stroke"></path></svg></label><div class="AccordionItem__Content-sc-494b3022-4 ivkvyJ"><div class="RichText__RichTextContainer-sc-9e038dfa-0 jqfZie"><p style="margin-top:0px;padding-top:0px"><span>We don't offer samples at this time, however, we do offer a 100% money-back guarantee on your first order if you and your dog are not completely satisfied with your experience. You can also start with a Topper Plan, which is 25% of a Full Plan — see more details below.</span></p></div></div></li><li class="AccordionItem__ListItem-sc-494b3022-0 ftmqhr"><input type="checkbox" id="accordion-accordion-block-What is FreshBaked?" aria-expanded="false" class="AccordionItem__Checkbox-sc-494b3022-2 iTUcqV" name="What is FreshBaked?"/><label for="accordion-accordion-block-What is FreshBaked?" class="AccordionItem__Title-sc-494b3022-3 hntPhV">What is FreshBaked?<!-- --> <svg width="20" height="20" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 20 20" color="#0068E1"><path d="m4.75 7.25 5.25 5.5 5.25-5.5" stroke="#0068E1" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" vector-effect="non-scaling-stroke"></path></svg></label><div class="AccordionItem__Content-sc-494b3022-4 ivkvyJ"><div class="RichText__RichTextContainer-sc-9e038dfa-0 jqfZie"><p style="margin-top:0px;padding-top:0px"><span>FreshBaked is an oven-baked, human-grade, dry food alternative for dogs. It has all the same nutrients that you come to expect with our FreshCooked entrées, but this time with a crunchy texture that dogs really love. Check out more info, including all ingredients, </span><a href="freshbaked"><span>here</span></a><span>.</span></p></div></div></li><li class="AccordionItem__ListItem-sc-494b3022-0 ftmqhr"><input type="checkbox" id="accordion-accordion-block-What's the difference between the Full and Topper Plan?" aria-expanded="false" class="AccordionItem__Checkbox-sc-494b3022-2 iTUcqV" name="What's the difference between the Full and Topper Plan?"/><label for="accordion-accordion-block-What's the difference between the Full and Topper Plan?" class="AccordionItem__Title-sc-494b3022-3 hntPhV">What's the difference between the Full and Topper Plan?<!-- --> <svg width="20" height="20" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 20 20" color="#0068E1"><path d="m4.75 7.25 5.25 5.5 5.25-5.5" stroke="#0068E1" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" vector-effect="non-scaling-stroke"></path></svg></label><div class="AccordionItem__Content-sc-494b3022-4 ivkvyJ"><div class="RichText__RichTextContainer-sc-9e038dfa-0 jqfZie"><p style="margin-top:0px;padding-top:0px"><span>If you want to feed your pup a 100% fresh-cooked diet that is complete & balanced, then our Full Plan is right for you. If you want to add some fresh-cooked food to your pup's current diet, then our Topper Plan is a great choice because it can be mixed in with their current food or served as an occasional meal for extra nutrition.</span></p></div></div></li></ul><a class="Button__StyledButton-sc-2a9baf4a-0 fpLrnW Accordion__StyledButton-sc-77064ffe-8 hqapKd" color="dark" href="https://petplatehelp.zendesk.com/hc/en-us" type="button" aria-label="More FAQs"><div class="Button__Content-sc-2a9baf4a-1 cWqgzw"><p class="sc-dmyCSP iUSbbF">More
